name: DoorDash, Inc.
summary: DoorDash, Inc. operates local commerce platforms including the DoorDash Marketplace, Wolt Marketplace, and Deliveroo Marketplace across over 40 countries, connecting merchants, consumers, and Dashers. The company offers on-demand delivery, advertising services, consumer membership programs (DashPass, Wolt+, Deliveroo Plus), and a Commerce Platform providing white-label delivery (Drive), online ordering, branded mobile apps, reservation management, tableside ordering, and customer support tools for merchants.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
